title: Living her dream
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A 27-year-old SA Army Band...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A 27-year-old SA Army Band member, Private Celine Michaels from Hornlee, has shown that perseverance is key to success, or, as she puts it, \"living her dream.\"","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A 27-year-old SA Army Band member, Private Celine Michaels from Hornlee, has shown that perseverance is key to success, or, as she puts it, \"living her dream.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A dream born in sound","html":"A dream born in sound"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her passion for music and the military was ignited in 2013, after witnessing the SA Navy's stirring performances at the Knysna Oyster Festival.","html":"Her passion for music and the military was ignited in 2013, after witnessing the SA Navy's stirring performances at the Knysna Oyster Festival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From that moment on, she knew she wanted to wear the uniform - not just as a soldier, but as a musician. However, the journey was anything but straightforward.","html":"From that moment on, she knew she wanted to wear the uniform - not just as a soldier, but as a musician. However, the journey was anything but straightforward."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"After matriculating at Knysna Secondary School in 2015, Michaels enrolled at South Cape College in George, where she pursued a qualification in human resource management."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Private Michaels teaching children from Hornlee during a musical workshop held at St James Anglican Church in Hornlee as part of the SA Army Band's programme during the Knysna Oyster Festival.","html":"Private Michaels teaching children from Hornlee during a musical workshop held at St James Anglican Church in Hornlee as part of the SA Army Band's programme during the Knysna Oyster Festival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Upon graduating in 2019, she undertook a series of internships and administrative roles, including stints at African Skills Village, Knysna SAPS, BG Bison Sawmill, Garden Route District Municipality, Sedgefield Clinic, VIP Blue Star and Blitsdruk.","html":"Upon graduating in 2019, she undertook a series of internships and administrative roles, including stints at African Skills Village, Knysna SAPS, BG Bison Sawmill, Garden Route District Municipality, Sedgefield Clinic, VIP Blue Star and Blitsdruk."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Despite the detours, her sights never strayed far from the military. \"I applied for the Military Skills Development System (MSDS) every year,\" she recalls. \"Each time, I mentioned my interest in music and my dream of joining the army band.\"","html":"Despite the detours, her sights never strayed far from the military. \"I applied for the Military Skills Development System (MSDS) every year,\" she recalls. \"Each time, I mentioned my interest in music and my dream of joining the army band.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A breakthrough in 2023","html":"A breakthrough in 2023"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her persistence paid off in January 2024 when her mother received an SMS inviting","html":"Her persistence paid off in January 2024 when her mother received an SMS inviting"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Michaels to begin her basic military training at the SA Infantry School in Oudtshoorn. She reported for duty on18 January 2024, joining one of the largest training intakes in years - with over 1 700 recruits.","html":"Michaels to begin her basic military training at the SA Infantry School in Oudtshoorn. She reported for duty on18 January 2024, joining one of the largest training intakes in years - with over 1 700 recruits."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"Captain Mahlare recognised me immediately,\" she says. \"Every application I submitted mentioned music. I think that stuck.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Private Celine Michaels (middle)  marches proudly to the beat of her perseverance. Photo: Rozano Alie","html":"Private Celine Michaels (middle) marches proudly to the beat of her perseverance. Photo: Rozano Alie"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After completing her nine-month training, she proudly marched at her passing out parade on 6 September 2024.","html":"After completing her nine-month training, she proudly marched at her passing out parade on 6 September 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Soon after, she performed for the first time with the SA Army Band. \"It felt surreal - like everything I worked for finally came together,\" she says.","html":"Soon after, she performed for the first time with the SA Army Band. \"It felt surreal - like everything I worked for finally came together,\" she says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mastering her craft","html":"Mastering her craft"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition to her military training, Michaels achieved a Grade 5, Level 2 certificate in music performance that qualified her for the SA Army Band. She specialises in the saxophone but is also skilled in trumpet.","html":"In addition to her military training, Michaels achieved a Grade 5, Level 2 certificate in music performance that qualified her for the SA Army Band. She specialises in the saxophone but is also skilled in trumpet."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"She is one of the most dependable and dedicated musicians I've worked with,\" says Sergeant Major Dane Andrews, the bandmaster."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Her character speaks volumes, and her work ethic is unmatched. She practices late into the night and never shies away from challenges.\"","html":"\"Her character speaks volumes, and her work ethic is unmatched. She practices late into the night and never shies away from challenges.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tribute to her mother","html":"Tribute to her mother"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Amid the joy of achieving her dream, Michaels endured the heartbreak of losing her mother.","html":"Amid the joy of achieving her dream, Michaels endured the heartbreak of losing her mother."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Her mother had been so proud and happy when she received Celine's acceptance SMS and was always a guiding force in her life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I sent her pictures of my first parade, and she replied with a voice note. I still listen to it when I miss her,\" Michaels shares.","html":"\"I sent her pictures of my first parade, and she replied with a voice note. I still listen to it when I miss her,\" Michaels shares."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"By making myself proud, I know I'm making her proud too.\"","html":"\"By making myself proud, I know I'm making her proud too.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Inspiration to others","html":"Inspiration to others"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Private Celine Michaels' story is a source of hope for anyone chasing a dream. Through years of uncertainty, rejections, and detours, she never lost sight of her goal.","html":"Private Celine Michaels' story is a source of hope for anyone chasing a dream. Through years of uncertainty, rejections, and detours, she never lost sight of her goal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now, clad in her uniform and with an instrument in hand, she marches proudly to the beat of her perseverance.","html":"Now, clad in her uniform and with an instrument in hand, she marches proudly to the beat of her perseverance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
